name: drift-detection scan reads E-5 inline suppression log at rubric/suppressions/<rule-id>.jsonl and surfaces per-rule counts
command: mkdir -p rubric/suppressions && printf '{"file":"a.js","line":1,"justification":"legacy"}\n{"file":"b.js","line":3,"justification":"vendor"}\n' > rubric/suppressions/no-eval.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --suppressions-dir rubric/suppressions --out report.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q 'no-eval' report.jsonl && grep -q '"suppression_count":2' report.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
